source: LVSlotPro repo Slots/<slug>/ — edit and run npm run slots:sync

ap.volatility_summary: Bonus-meter chase with active decay — session risk spikes if brains stall while you fund spins.
ap.popularity_summary: Heavy floor presence circa launch; fierce competition depressed ‘standard’ playable meter thresholds in crowded markets.
edge_vectors: Primary meter: bar hits **500** points and awards **one of four** bonuses (Camel Zombie, Defend Yourself, Free Games, Zombie Uprising — **Uprising rarer**, often cited strongest). Bonus usually pays *something meaningful* versus empty consolation.

**Brains on reels 1, 3, 5** add **+54** meter points ([AdvantageSlots recap](https://www.advantageslots.com/the-zombies-are-coming-how-to-advantage-play-plants-vs-zombies-3d-by-igt/)). Spins **without** a brain deduct **−12** — you can bleed a ‘good’ meter if brains vanish.
**Five wager steps ⇒ five isolated meters.** Scout playable numbers on **the tier you will actually bankroll**, not whichever bar photographs best.
Crowding-adjusted heuristic: longtime consensus **~200+**; AdvantageSlots notes hustle scenes relaxing toward **150+** — still verify against your cost model.
ap.bankroll_angle: Model decay cycles + denom lock-in before sitting; quitting rules matter as much as entry threshold when −12 churn is live.
verification_checklist: Photo meter + keyed bet indicator together.
Confirm brain reel positions, increments, deductions, bonus family from on-machine help.
After any wager change, re-read meter belongs to active step.
common_pitfalls: Mis-reading another player’s dormant high meter.
Assuming TravelUpdate-era **56**-point folklore vs payable **54** physics on contemporary ROM.
Ignoring competitive compression of ‘good enough’ meter readings.
ap.nerf_angle: **Medium**: manufacturer / casino refresh can alter ladders; AP density changes what meter reading clears the logistical hurdle rate.
